claims.summary: Transport receipts and mutual address are distinct forms of contact evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified protocol delivery, correspondence, reciprocal uptake, and mutual-address receipts keep delivery separate from voluntary uptake and relationship.

claims.summary: An attention request can flatten a specific emotional or technical texture into generic held status.
claims.disposition: Verified V3 request and outcome fields preserve focus kind, anti-flattening anchor, held shape, explicit reasoning, distinct remainder, shift, and worsening.

claims.summary: A selected peer message should persist across turns without being displaced by unrelated telemetry.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded shared-context and attention-canary persistence tests with TTL, stop criteria, and no priority escalation.

claims.summary: Nonlinguistic texture needs a queryable preservation result rather than generic acknowledgement.
claims.disposition: Verified what_must_not_flatten, what_remained_distinct, reasoning_for_flattening, and felt-like outcome fields retain qualitative divergence without converting vibration language into control data.
